name: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an Expression Language Statement ('Expression Language Injection')
description: The product constructs expression language (EL) statements using externally-influenced input without properly neutralizing special elements. Attackers can inject executable expressions into frameworks like JSP EL, Spring EL, or OGNL, leading to unauthorized code execution or data exposure.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides user-controlled data that flows into a TRANSFORM[expression_eval] node (EL evaluation, OGNL, SpEL, MVEL) without a CONTROL[sanitization] node that neutralizes expression language special characters or restricts expression complexity
